nasb.text: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; and children will rise up against parents and have them put to death.

esv.text: And brother will deliver brother over to death, and the father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death.

cnv.text: 弟兄要出賣弟兄，父親要出賣兒子，甚至把他們置於死地；兒女要悖逆父母，害死他們。

ccb.text: “那时，人必把自己的弟兄置于死地，父亲必把儿子置于死地，儿女必反叛父母，置他们于死地。

csbs.text: 兄弟将要把兄弟出卖，置于死地；父亲对孩子也会这样。儿女会起来与父母作对，并且害死他们。
